result:
Recovery complete. The tree is now clean-and-honest and fully synced with `origin/main`.

## Recovery summary — 2026-07-08 AM

**What died:** The 07-07 PM scheduled session hit a **session-limit 429** ("resets 1am Oslo"), cost $0, did zero work — not credential death, not a half-built step. The dirty tree was pure accumulation since the prior (07-07 AM) recovery push, which was still local due to OFFLINE-MODE pull failures.

**Classification (all 11 paths benign — no code, no `.env`, no masterplan, no trading-behavior file):**
| Path | Disposition |
|---|---|
| `.cycle_heartbeat.json`, `cycle_history.jsonl`, `kill_switch_audit.jsonl` | scheduled-cycle state — cycle `0725d2aa` **completed cleanly** (0 trades, breaker healthy, no kill-switch flip) → committed |
| `audit/*.jsonl` (2 files) | append-only hook streams → committed |
| `.autonomous_loop.lock` (D) | normal lock release → committed |
| `autoresearch/2026-07-08-ERROR-topic07.md` | upstream arXiv HTTP 500 (external) → committed |
| `session_pm_20260707…json` | the 429 crash artifact → committed |
| `phase-66.1/` archive + `.archive-baseline.json` | `archive-handoff` hook caught up a missed snapshot of the **done** 66.1 step → committed |
| `session_am_20260708…json` (0 bytes) | this session's own live output → **left untracked** (empty; wrapper writes post-exit) |

**Actions:** One `chore(away-ops)` recovery commit (`552f518e`) + auto-changelog follow-up (`dac40756`), pushed successfully. Appended a `## Recovery -- 2026-07-08` section to `session_notes.md` and corrected one stale line (next pending step is **66.2**, not 66.1). **No** `git checkout/restore/stash`; main-only, no force-push; $0 metered (git/cat/wc only); no subagents; no new operator token. All 10 rails honored.

**Remaining residuals (both expected, not real dirt):** a self-referential `pre_tool_use_audit.jsonl` line from the post-commit git calls, and the 0-byte `session_am` artifact — both swept next session.

Per the recovery mandate, I'm **not** starting a new masterplan step — the next AM session resumes the calendar (step **66.2** pending) with a clean tree. One standing operator item worth flagging: the approved `SETUP-TOKEN` (`claude setup-token`) run is still pending on the host, and the portfolio remains all-cash since 07-03 (kill-switch state). Exiting.
